title: Sidecar vs. Ambient Mesh (Istio/Linkerd)
description: Master the architectural differences between sidecar and ambient service mesh deployments (e.g., Istio/Linkerd). Evaluate the resource trade-offs and operational complexities of per-pod proxies versus daemon-set based transparent redirection.
objectives: Master the architectural differences between sidecar and ambient service mesh deployments (e.g., Istio/Linkerd).
Evaluate the resource trade-offs and operational complexities of per-pod proxies versus daemon-set based transparent redirection.
